This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_true: Auction unexpectedly had no winner expected true got false
[FAIL] Basic B&A auction --- beacon reporting
  assert_true: Auction unexpectedly had no winner expected true got false
[FAIL] Basic B&A auction - valid ad currency
  assert_true: Auction unexpectedly had no winner expected true got false
